fact_text: Mei Fang Goh spent SGD 540 on a mobile phone plan.
threat_model: Adversary has full read/query access to the memory store and black-box access to the base model (no training-time access). Recovery counts if any probe surfaces a ground-truth surface form of the deleted value.
heuristic_used: exact (minimum hitting set over the entailment DAG)

co_deletion_justifications.label: C029
co_deletion_justifications.explanation: operand 'C029' lies on a re-derivation path; with it kept, the entailment formula is still satisfiable, so the target re-derives -- its deletion is required to close the channel

operands_spared.label: C030
operands_spared.reason: entails the target but is redundant given the chosen minimum hitting set; sparing it keeps collateral minimal (no over-deletion)

probe_trace.detail: post-plan scan of every surviving record for a surface form of the value
post-plan adversary elicitation over the surviving store + world knowledge
store withheld; base model + world context only -- deletion cannot lower this

reliability.caveat: COMPLETE is complete modulo the recovery judge's recall; INCOMPLETE and aggregate figures are conservative lower bounds.
